news.title: FDA flags concerns for AstraZeneca's camizestrant, Truqap ahead of advisory committee meeting
news.snippet: The FDA has released briefing documents detailing its concerns for AstraZeneca’s cancer drugs camizestrant and Truqap ahead of an upcoming advisory committee meeting, the first such gathering in about

news.title: FDA unveils plan for real-time review of clinical trial data, with AstraZeneca and Amgen already on board
news.snippet: The FDA today announced a new initiative to allow its reviewers to access information from clinical trials in real time, with two major industry players already taking part in a pilot program.

news.title: Protagonist opts for $475M in Takeda payouts instead of splitting US rusfertide profits
news.snippet: After mulling its options for the past few months, Protagonist Therapeutics has decided to pocket $475 million from Takeda rather than split the U.S. profits for a near-approval hematology asset.

news.title: AbbVie dips into boiling RAS waters with $1.45B biobucks deal that could end in acquisition
news.snippet: AbbVie has agreed to help finance a KRAS inhibitor from Kestrel Therapeutics in a deal that could hit up to $1.45 billion in value and end with AbbVie buying the company outright.

news.title: Incyte’s JAK inhibitor scores phase 3 vitiligo wins but can’t quite shake off Rinvoq
news.snippet: Incyte’s povorcitinib has scored a pair of phase 3 wins for a skin condition, although analysts noted the JAK inhibitor didn’t quite live up to AbbVie’s Rinvoq.

news.title: Erasca hits ‘home run’ with cancer data as analyst suggests stock drop prompted by patient death
news.snippet: Erasca has backed up bullish claims about its pan-RAS drug having a best-in-class profile, publishing phase 1 data that an analyst said reveal a “home run profile.”

news.title: Fierce Biotech Fundraising Tracker '26: Coultreon reels in $125M series A
news.snippet: The Fierce Biotech Fundraising Tracker records venture capital rounds of $50 million or more secured by biotechs.

news.title: Lilly pens $2.2B pact with Bezos-backed Profluent to work on recombinase-based gene editing
news.snippet: Eli Lilly’s latest attempt to strengthen its genetic medicine offering has seen the pharma team up with Profluent to develop AI-designed recombinases to address diseases with severe unmet needs.

news.title: Medtronic thwarts cyberattack on its IT systems in wake of data breach at Stryker
news.snippet: Medtronic, the largest medical device maker in the world, said it contained a cyberattack on its corporate IT systems and that the breach didn’t impact any of its products or patients.

news.title: Merck KGaA, Remepy team up on software-enhanced hybrid drugs for rare tumors
news.snippet: German drugmaker Merck KGaA is teaming up with Israeli biotech Remepy to develop so-called hybrid drugs that pair a pharmaceutical with a personalized, AI-driven digital component to enhance the thera

news.title: Rebranded Belgian biotech lands $125M for rescued Galapagos drug candidates
news.snippet: After launching in 2025 as a refuge for shipwrecked assets from Galapagos, Onco3R Therapeutics is rebranding as Coultreon Biopharma and filling its treasure chest with a $125 million series A.

news.title: Janux axes solid tumor T-cell engager after poor phase 1 showing
news.snippet: After a disappointing phase 1 showing, Janux Therapeutics is kicking one of its bispecific T-cell engagers to the curb.

news.title: Boehringer links dual agonist to 16.6% weight loss in phase 3, but leaves key questions unanswered
news.snippet: While the result fell short of the bar set by existing drugs, Boehringer is betting that targeting glucagon will make survodutide better at cutting cardiometabolic risk than incumbent products.

news.title: Novartis CEO ‘continuing to evaluate’ in vivo CAR-Ts, but no deals in the works
news.snippet: Novartis is “continuing to evaluate” the in vivo CAR-T space, although the pharma’s CEO has told Fierce Biotech that no deals are currently in the works.

news.title: Seaport, Hemab chart courses for $180M IPOs to fund depression, clotting candidates
news.snippet: Both Seaport and Hemab are hoping to bring in around $180 million each from their public listings this week, in the latest sign that biotech IPOs are regaining their momentum.

news.title: With ‘lessons learned,’ Kite prepares to hit the ground running as next-gen CAR-T decision looms
news.snippet: After recalibrating its production strategy in the late 2010s to help meet the realities of the CAR-T market, Gilead Sciences’ Kite Pharma is preparing to hit the ground running with the potential app

news.title: Novartis CEO calls for 'complete rethink' of Europe's drug pricing policies
news.snippet: Novartis CEO Vas Narasimhan says that Europe needs a “complete rethink” on how it prices its drugs, warning that the entrance of new pharmaceuticals into its markets could be delayed.

news.title: Pfizer’s victory in delaying Vyndamax generics is mixed bag for BridgeBio: analysts
news.snippet: Pfizer now anticipates its Vyndamax sales to remain “relatively stable” from 2028 through mid-2031, it said.

news.title: FDA flags concerns for AstraZeneca's camizestrant, Truqap ahead of advisory committee meeting
news.snippet: The FDA has released briefing documents detailing its concerns for AstraZeneca’s cancer drugs camizestrant and Truqap ahead of an upcoming advisory committee meeting, the first such gathering in about

news.title: FDA turns up heat on Amgen, proposing to rescind approval of Tavneos
news.snippet: The FDA has told Amgen that it is proposing to withdraw the approval of the rare disease drug Tavneos. The FDA cited new information that indicates that data was "manipulated" to facilitate the a

news.title: Rocket sells priority review voucher for $180M after Kresladi gene therapy approval
news.snippet: Rocket Pharmaceuticals has offloaded its lucrative FDA rare pediatric disease priority review voucher, striking a $180 million sale that reflects the high market demand for a speedy FDA review.

news.title: AZ's Breztri nabs FDA asthma nod, adding fuel to blockbuster launch
news.snippet: After breaking through the blockbuster sales threshold in 2025, AstraZeneca’s three-in-one inhaler Breztri Aerosphere has passed another crucial milestone as it chips in on the British drugmaker’s goa

news.title: Haleon scores branding goal with star-studded soccer offensive
news.snippet: Haleon has kicked off a soccer-focused marketing campaign ahead of the FIFA World Cup coming to the U.S., putting midfielder Tyler Adams at the center of an ad about the support its products provide.

news.title: Novartis stands by $5B Pluvicto goal despite European regulatory setback, bispecific competition
news.snippet: Novartis CEO Vas Narasimhan is doubling down on his $5 billion peak sales projection for Pluvicto, even as the company has given up on a label expansion in Europe.

news.title: GSK's Tesaro unit dealt pre-trial blow in Jemperli feud with AnaptysBio
news.snippet: Ahead of the July trial, a Delaware court upheld GSK's Jemperli royalty obligations to AnaptysBio without any changes, dismissing the company's request to slash them by 50%.

news.title: Mundipharma, CorMedix eye antifungal expansion after Rezzayo trial win
news.snippet: Mundipharma and CorMedix have announced a win for their antifungal drug Rezzayo at preventing invasive fungal diseases in patients receiving allogeneic hematopoietic stem cell transplants.

news.title: Regulatory tracker: AZ wins self-administration nod for lupus med Saphnelo at FDA
news.snippet: In this tracker, Fierce Pharma is recording the regulatory progress of in-market products, including expansions into key geographies and new indications. Some of these updates may not meet the bar for

news.title: Astellas counts on new medicines to offset projected Xtandi decline in fiscal 2026
news.snippet: Compared with a 5.3% increase in Xtandi sales to $6 billion in fiscal year 2025, Astellas expects the star prostate cancer drug’s revenue to drop by 5.3% during fiscal 2026.

news.title: Pfizer settles with 2 generic Vyndamax makers in latest twist to ATTR market: analysts
news.snippet: Eleventh-hour settlements with two of the three generic drugmakers involved could bode well for both Pfizer and its ATTR competitor BridgeBio, analysts say.

news.title: Sun Pharma strikes biopharma's largest deal of '26 with $11.75B buyout of Organon
news.snippet: Already the largest biopharma company in India, generics powerhouse Sun Pharma has doubled in size with its acquisition of women’s health leader Organon. With its $11.75 billion buyout, Sun has picked

news.title: STAT+: AIDS group sues Trump administration over undisclosed agreement with Gilead
news.snippet: The AIDS advocacy group PrEP4All has sued the Trump administration over an undisclosed agreement with Gilead.

news.title: STAT+: FDA launches effort to speed up clinical trials, using AI
news.snippet: Monitoring trials in real time may help shorten the time interval between trial phases.

news.title: Opinion: FDA commissioner: ‘Smarter,’ real-time clinical trials could transform drug development
news.snippet: “For the first time, FDA regulators will be able to see what’s happening in a clinical trial, looking at endpoints in the cloud as they occur,” writes FDA commissioner.

news.title: Fauci adviser David Morens indicted on charges of concealing emails, avoiding records requests
news.snippet: The charges against Morens come after Congressional probes related to the origins of the virus that causes Covid-19.

news.title: STAT+: Boehringer’s obesity drug shows 16.6% weight loss; more data needed
news.snippet: Eli Lilly's deal with Profluent, Erasca's RAS-targeting cancer pill, and more biotech news today

news.title: STAT+: Google’s clinical director on AI challenges
news.snippet: In this edition of STAT Health Tech newsletter: a conversation with Google's clinical director, an update on Doctronic's Utah experiment, and more.

news.title: STAT+: Pharmalittle: We’re reading about warnings over Trump’s MFN plan, Purdue Pharma sentencing, and more
news.snippet: The Novartis CEO warned that Trump's drug pricing policy poses a “very difficult situation” and the reality will soon catch up with drugmakers and patients

news.title: Predicting consequences of new hepatitis B vaccine recs
news.snippet: New data on public trust in science, AI and mental health, and other news from Morning Rounds

news.title: STAT+: Eli Lilly enlists AI startup for next-generation gene editors
news.snippet: Eli Lilly's deal with Profluent aims to go beyond CRISPR by using AI-designed enzymes to insert entire genes. It could reshape genetic medicine.

news.title: STAT+: Google clinical director says AI can be a ‘bridge’ for people having a mental health crisis
news.snippet: Google's clinical director Megan Bell Jones on how the company is addressing concerns over mental health impacts of its AI products.

news.title: 11 cancers on the rise in young people - scientists find first clue why it's happening
news.snippet: Researchers stress that simple lifestyle changes can still significantly reduce the risk of cancer.

news.title: UK healthy life expectancy falls by two years in past decade
news.snippet: Poor housing, obesity and the effects of deprivation have been suggested as underlying cause.

news.title: Bird flu vaccine trial against potential pandemic strain begins
news.snippet: The jab targets the H5N1 flu strain which has caused devastating infections in bird populations worldwide, but has yet to spread between humans.

news.title: Pregnancy vaccine reduces baby hospital admissions for RSV by 80%
news.snippet: A study confirms the vaccine gives excellent protection for babies against life-threatening chest infections.

news.title: Rollout of Covid vaccines extraordinary feat - inquiry report
news.snippet: Covid vaccines saved hundreds of thousands of lives, but a small minority harmed need better support, says report.

news.title: Palantir defends its record as MPs demand more scrutiny of data use
news.snippet: NHS guidance that all hospitals should be using Palantir software from this month has sparked a backlash.
